system_requirements.world_mission: Contain the Blight Virus and restore humanity's last strongholds

dynamic_lore.theme_and_tone: Desperate survival in a decaying world where trust is deadlier than rot
dynamic_lore.core_conflict: Factions of survivors battle both the spreading zombie hordes and each other for dwindling resources
dynamic_lore.infection_spread_mechanics: The Blight Virus spreads through bodily fluids and aerosolized spores in collapsing cities, with three stages of infection before full reanimation
dynamic_lore.survival_factions: Quartermaster Guilds (resource traders), Warden Clans (militant protectors), and Free Wanderers (nomadic loners) vie for dominance
dynamic_lore.zombie_types: Staggerers (early-stage infected), Rotwalkers (decaying fast zombies), and Hive Minds (collective intelligence hordes)
